_doc: THE model feature registry (roadmap P5). Order matters: it defines the
saved models' feature order. Consumed by analytics-py/featurize.py
graph_dataset.py (NODE_NUM) derive from — adding a numeric feature is:
(1) add it here, (2) provide its value in the producers' enrichment
(train_eta load paths, server request types if live-served).
TS request interfaces (server/index.ts, app.py pydantic models) stay
hand-typed on purpose — compile-time safety over registry magic.
